benchmark_use.semantic_ids: The source has no semantic IDs. The benchmark generates one deterministic spatial-octant sidecar and shares it across renderers.
benchmark_use.usage: The canonical LOD0 PLY is an external dependency and is not embedded in the evidence archive.

modifications.description: Selected the source asset's full-resolution LOD0 chunks, preserved record order, merged them, and converted the PlayCanvas SOG representation to a canonical binary little-endian degree-zero PLY.
